Risk_Description: Student personal information may be visible to other users
Mitigation_Action: Display only necessary profile information and protect personal data

Risk_Description: Unauthorized users may access administrator functions
Mitigation_Action: Implement role-based access control and restrict admin pages to authorized users only

Risk_Description: Images or event posters may be used without proper permission
Mitigation_Action: Use royalty-free images or obtain permission and record image sources

Risk_Description: Users may assume all event information is officially approved by the university
Mitigation_Action: Add a disclaimer explaining that event information should be verified with official university announcements

Risk_Description: Duplicate events may appear in the event list
Mitigation_Action: Allow organizers and administrators to identify and remove duplicate events before publishing

Risk_Description: Event descriptions or uploaded images may accidentally reveal personal information
Mitigation_Action: Provide submission guidelines and review event content before publication
